name: Globa Terra Acquisition Corp
business: Globa Terra Acquisition Corp is a blank check company formed to effect a merger or acquisition with one or more businesses, focusing on the agribusiness and water sectors. It has not commenced any operations nor generated any revenues to date.
sellsTo: No current operations; the company is a SPAC seeking to acquire a target business

exposures.sentence: We intend to focus our search on target businesses within the agribusiness and water sectors, primarily in food-tech, ag-tech, bio-tech, controlled environment agriculture and open field crops in the case of agribusiness, and in water utility, water treatment, pipelines, desalination and other water solutions within the water sectors.

We intend to focus our search on target businesses within the agribusiness and water sectors, primarily in food-tech, ag-tech, bio-tech, controlled environment agriculture and open field crops in the case of agribusiness, and in water utility, water treatment, pipelines, desalination and other water solutions within the water sectors.
Implementation of robotics, AI and machine learning platforms to increase productivity, efficiency and reduce labor costs.

Fintech transformation in agriculture, comparable to the Fintech impact on the student loan and mortgage markets.
